articles.title: Attention Is All You Need — The Transformer Paper Explained
articles.description: The foundational paper that introduced the Transformer architecture, replacing RNNs with self-attention for sequence modeling.

articles.title: Building a Second Brain: A Proven Method to Organize Your Digital Life
articles.description: Tiago Forte's framework for capturing, organizing, and sharing knowledge using digital tools. The CODE methodology: Capture, Organize, Distill, Express.

articles.title: How React Server Components Work Under the Hood
articles.description: Deep dive into React Server Components — how they reduce client-side JS, enable streaming, and change the mental model for data fetching.
articles.note: Good reference for the RSC migration

articles.title: Show HN: I built a local-first sync engine
articles.description: A developer shares their approach to building a CRDT-based sync engine that works offline-first with eventual consistency.

articles.title: The Bitter Lesson by Rich Sutton
articles.description: Rich Sutton argues that general methods leveraging computation are ultimately the most effective in AI, rather than human-designed features.
articles.note: Classic essay. Explains why scaling works.
